name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident f679f67a-fb6e-441c-a269-be41c0bc5962
description:
Here is the analysis:

**SUMMARY**: A critical threat was detected, triggering immediate blocking of the malicious IP address 192.168.1.25.

**TECHNIQUE**: The most likely MITRE ATT&CK technique used is **T1045 Remote Access Software**, specifically the "Callback" sub-technique to establish a command and control channel.

**ACTION**: BLOCK_IP
